name: Mrs. Howard's Baked Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
5 cups if needed
Salt and cook the cabbage with very little water until tender. Drain well.
Grease a baking dish.
Alternate layers of cabbage, grated cheese (mix of longhorn and processed), and white sauce.
Top with cheese and sprinkle cornflake crumbs.
Bake at 350°F until heated through and cheese is golden brown.
Serves: 6
Make medium white sauce by melting butter over low heat. Add flour and cook a few minutes. Stir in milk until thickened (about 10 minutes).
